chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.51 of 2023 Muhammad Ifrahim & another Versus M/s J.S. Bank Ltd. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA 2639/23 Dated: 24.01.2024 Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara for appellants. -.-.- Since auction proceedings have been separately challenged, learned counsel, on instructions, does not press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge
